title: Checkered Plate Set in Blue, Green, and Orange
description:
Sometimes the simplest designs are the ones that work best at the table. Each plate in this set has a hand-painted checkered pattern — loose, slightly irregular crosshatching that looks like a countryside tablecloth translated into ceramic. The set comes in three colours: deep blue, leaf green, and warm orange, each on a white background.

Our artisans in Vietri sul Mare paint every line by hand, which is why the checks aren't perfectly uniform. The brushstrokes overlap and vary in width, and the colour washes from dark to light in places. That unevenness is the whole point — it's what makes these plates feel alive rather than printed.

Available in small, medium, and large sizes, so you can build a full table setting or mix and match across the three colours. They're made with food-safe, non-toxic glazes and have a glossy finish that cleans up easily. Use them for everyday meals or for a dinner party where you want the table to feel colourful but not fussy.

Part of our Arcobaleno Collection, which plays with geometric patterns and bold colour. The plates sit well together, and mixing the three colours across a table gives a cheerful, informal look that's very much in the spirit of the Amalfi Coast.
excerpt: Hand-painted checkered plates in blue, green, and orange. Available in three sizes. Part of the Arcobaleno Collection.
seoTitle: Checkered Plate Set — Ceramiche Da Mario
seoDescription: Handmade checkered ceramic plates in blue, green, and orange, painted freehand in Vietri sul Mare. Arcobaleno Collection by Ceramiche Da Mario.
